nameMeanings.name: Sound
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 English: nickname from Middle English sound, sund ‘sound, healthy, prosperous’ (Old English sund), for a healthy or prosperous person.
2 English: (i) locative name from Middle English sound, sund ‘sound (body of water, sea)’ (Old English sund), for someone who lived by a sound or strait. (ii) variant of Sand .

variants.name: Sand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Bertel, Ejnar, Lars, Levinus, Nels, Niels, Thor.

English, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a patch of sandy soil, from the vocabulary word sand (German Sand). As a Swedish name it was often purely ornamental, and as a Jewish artificial. It is also found in France (see 3 below).
English: habitational name from a place such as Send (Surrey) or Sound (Cheshire), named with Middle English sand, sond ‘sand’.

variants.name: Sund
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Morten, Sven.
Swedish and Danish: from sund ‘strait, sound’, a topographic name adopted by someone who lived by a strait or an ornamental name (often from a corresponding placename element).
Norwegian: habitational name from any of twenty-five or more farmsteads, mainly in Nordland, from Old Norse sund ‘strait, sound’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Sound had at least 1 daughter.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Soundは少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Sound teve pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: У Thomas Sound была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Thomas Sound tuvo por lo menos 1 hija.
